name: us500_ema_pullback_m15
hypothesis: On US500 M15, in an ADX-confirmed uptrend (EMA50>EMA200, ADX>18), a pullback to EMA20 with RSI(14) dipping to 40-50 then turning up offers asymmetric continuation trades during US cash hours.

entry_rules.long: ema50 > ema200 AND low <= ema20 AND rsi14 crosses up through 50 AND close > ema20
entry_rules.short: ema50 < ema200 AND high >= ema20 AND rsi14 crosses down through 50 AND close < ema20

regime_filter.rationale: Pullback entries only work in directional regimes; ADX<18 means chop where EMA20 touches are noise.

exit_rules.sl: 1.3 * ATR(14) below swing low / above swing high

falsification_criteria: PF<1.3 IS, or trades<200, or win rate on pullback entries indistinguishable from random EMA20 touches (A/B vs non-ADX-filtered baseline).
